results.title: Top Adapt.io Alternative (2025) - Get Started | LeadLoft
results.content:
Adapt.io

VS

# The #1 Adapt.io Alternative

Adapt.io is a massive B2B database that allows any organization to find leads in bulk. This is obviously extremely useful for prospecting, but is it the right tool for you? In this review, we will be discussing Adapt and determining whether or not it's the perfect tool for you and your team. Let's dive into it!

Check Out LeadLoftLearn More

Our take

## Adapt is great for prospecting but what about for outreach? [...] Adapt.io is a great prospecting solution for B2B sales teams. If you already have an outbound process set up, then Adapt is likely a great solution for you. You can simply integrate it with your software, begin prospecting, and start engaging leads in a single day. However, if you don't already have an outbound sales process set up, then you'll be required to purchase multiple software applications to run outreach. In these cases, it's probably better to go with an all-in-one sales solution like Interseller or LeadLoft, which is designed to not only find leads but also to engage them. To recap, Adapt is a great prospecting software but it doesn't offer outreach automation. If you already have outreach automation set up, go with Adapt. Otherwise, it's probably best to go with a full funnel [...] Adapt.io, a sales acceleration software platform that provides B2B contact database for prospecting for marketing & recruiting. Find anyone’s business email address, phone number with b2b lead prospecting tool. Get free credits every month!

results.title: Tempur-Pedic Alternatives (2026) | Mattress Nerd
results.content:
Average Customer Rating

4.8 / 5

Watch Our Video Review

The TEMPUR-LuxeAdapt is the top tier mattress in the Adapt collection. It uses an advanced foam that contours closely to your body, and it’s offered in soft or firm. The Saatva mattress also has multiple firmness options, but they all have a hotel-like hybrid construction.

Candidly, the Saatva mattress is one of our favorites here at Mattress Nerd. It performed incredibly well on almost all of our lab tests, and so we’d recommend it as an alternative to just about any mattress.

Read our full Saatva Mattress Review to learn more. [...] Side Sleepers

This bed offers pressure relief at both the shoulders and hips, making it a great fit for side sleepers.

Back Sleepers

This bed’s strong support is ideal for back sleepers because it helps keep the spine neutrally aligned.

Stomach Sleepers

This mattress is ideal for stomach sleepers as its firm support promotes spinal alignment.

Seniors

This bed is perfect for senior sleepers, as it provides them support and easy mobility.

Visit Leesa

Average Customer Rating

4.5 / 5

Watch Our Video Review

The TEMPUR-Adapt uses similar foam materials as the TEMPUR-Cloud, and it’s also offered in all-foam and hybrid versions. The Adapt is a touch softer than the Cloud, and it’s similar to a lower-cost foam mattress called the Leesa. [...] Seniors

This bed is perfect for senior sleepers, as it provides them support and easy mobility.

Visit Helix

Average Customer Rating

4.6 / 5

Watch Our Video Review

The TEMPUR-ProAdapt is second in the Adapt line, and it’s offered in soft, medium, medium hybrid, and firm. It’s an elevated version of the TEMPUR-Adapt mattress, and it offers excellent pressure relief.  The closest comparison would be the Helix Midnight Luxe, which matches the ProAdapt for pressure relief, and has the added benefits of coils (breathability, bounce, etc.).

While the Helix Midnight Luxe isn’t considered a budget mattress, it’s more affordable than the ProAdapt. When you buy a Helix mattress, you get free shipping, a 100-night sleep trial, and a 15-year warranty.

results.title: Best Tempur-Pedic Mattress Alternatives 2026 - Forbes Vetted
results.content:
If the ultra-conforming support that comes from the Tempur-Adapt Luxe Adapt Mattress appeals to you, the Saatva Contour5 could be an excellent alternative. This mattress has a high-end memory foam feel, with a texture that immediately contours around your frame and offers pressure relief. It’s stacked with several layers made from premium, dense memory foam, which keeps you from sinking in too deeply. This mattress also offers impressive edge support, which makes getting out of bed easier. [...] ## Best Tempur-Pedic LuxeAdapt Alternative

### Body-Hugging Without Trapping Heat

### Saatva Contour5 Mattress (Queen)

Type: High-density, gel-infused foam | Firmness: Medium or firm | Delivery: Free white-glove delivery | Trial: 365 nights | Warranty: Lifetime

Best for:

 Sleepers who love body-hugging support
 Hot sleepers who would benefit from cooling properties
 Anyone who values eco-conscious materials
 Sleepers with back pain

Skip if:

 You aren’t willing to pay $99 to return if you aren’t satisfied [...] Tempur-Pedic’s Tempur-Adapt Mattress is designed to morph to your body and nestle around your joints in order to provide more restful sleep. Similarly, the Tuft & Needle Original Mattress features the brand’s signature Flex Foam that responds to your body by contouring around each curve, offering supreme comfort and support. Ranked as our pick for best budget memory foam mattress, this option is simple yet crowd-pleasing with a comfortable 2-layer design. It offers structured support, thanks to its Adaptive Foam, with bounce-back structure that won’t leave you feeling sunk. Plus, it features Greenguard Gold and CertiPur-US certifications, so you can sleep soundly knowing your mattress is free from harmful chemicals and off-gassing.

## Best Tempur-Pedic LuxeAdapt Alternative

results.content:
Skip to Content 

ADAPT Investment Managers

ADAPT Investment Managers

# Experts in derivative market dislocations, building strategies with asymmetric return profiles and low correlation to other asset classes

ADAPT Investment Managers SA (AIM) is a Swiss-based investment manager led by a team of experienced derivatives specialists, each bringing decades of experience in trading, risk management, and operations. ADAPT IM aims to deliver alpha to institutional investors across market cycles, while maintaining low correlation to both traditional asset classes and other alternative strategies.
